name: remotty
description: Plugin-first setup and operations for the remotty Windows local agent bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and run the Windows local agent bridge from plugin commands
interface.longDescription: Use plugin commands to configure the Telegram bot token, pair an allowed sender, start or inspect the bridge, and run live checks without exposing secrets in repo-tracked files.
defaultPrompt: Configure the Telegram bridge plugin-first, pair my Telegram account, and start the Windows bridge
